stage.name: Twilight: The Wider Landscape
stage.summary: The day widens into other AI systems and why LLMs arrived now.
stage.focus: How LLMs fit into the larger AI landscape.
stage.keyDistinction: Not all generative AI works the same way.

cards.title: How AI Learns
cards.mainFinding: Accurate durable-versus-temporary distinction, but the visual and interaction do not yet support the full learning-modes map.

cards.title: Diffusion vs Autoregression
cards.mainFinding: Clear denoising definition, but the visual should compare denoising with autoregressive append-and-repeat.

cards.title: Multimodal AI
cards.mainFinding: Clear definition, but the visual should avoid implying one simple shared vector space and should show more input/output combinations.

cards.title: The Perfect Storm
cards.mainFinding: Strong content and visual, but the interaction falls back to a generic feature cloud instead of storm ingredients.

majorContentFindings: The stage order is coherent and should remain unchanged.
The first three cards need richer lesson architecture to match current standards.
How AI Learns should function as a synthesis map, not a repeat of earlier training/RAG mechanics.
Diffusion and Multimodal should stay concise but sharper about their distinctions from LLM text generation.
The Perfect Storm is a strong bridge to Midnight Ledger but needs a better tiny interaction.
majorVisualFindings: How AI Learns visual is readable but too thin.
Diffusion visual needs a side-by-side autoregression contrast.
Multimodal central label is tight and the shared-hub metaphor needs careful limits.
Perfect Storm visual is aligned and is the best future Image 2 candidate.
No screenshot showed a need for a heavy 3D library.

recommendedImage2Assets.description: Textless ZenTron Origami convergence scene showing data, compute, methods, labor, and incentives flowing toward a model cloud.
Textless denoise-from-noise concept scene, only as support beside a coded comparison.
Textless media-hub support scene, after the coded input/output map is improved.

verification.build: passed with existing Vite large-chunk warning
verification.buildPages: passed with existing Vite large-chunk warning

knownIssues: The existing Vite large-chunk warning remains.
Some audit screenshots required clean headless Chrome capture because the in-app browser timed out on long Journey-page screenshots.
The live app still contains the Perfect Storm generic feature-cloud interaction; this audit intentionally did not change it.
